mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM member_blacklist b LEFT JOIN user_info u ON b.user_id = u.userId
SELECT userId FROM user_info WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM member_blacklist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_blacklist(user_id, reason, operator, status, created_date) VALUES(#{userId}, #{reason}, #{operator}, #{status}, #{createdDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE member_blacklist SET status = 0 WHERE status = 1 AND user_id = (SELECT t.user_id FROM (SELECT user_id FROM member_blacklist WHERE id = #{id}) t)
